meaning: n.打架,战斗,斗志vi.打仗,搏斗,对抗,打架vt.与...打仗,指挥战斗,反对...提案
examples: Did you have a fight with him?
He broke his nose in the fight.
They had no stomach for a fight.
Entire towns congregate around sporting arenas to watch members of the community fight each other.
The American Beverage Association, which is leading the fight against the ban, welcomed the decision.
